end,{},function(k)local c,B=-343285+343286,k[-520706-(-520707)]while B do A[B],c=A[B]-(614176+-614175),c+(-360814-(-360815))if A[B]==154765-154765 then A[B],C[B]=nil,nil end B=k[c]end end,function(k,c)local g=z(c)local b=function(b,x,m)return B(k,{b,x,m},c,g)end return b end,function(k,c)local g=z(c)local b=function(b,x,m,l,w,C,A,L,P)return B(k,{b;x,m,l,w;C;A,L;P},c,g)end return b return(q(689062+10980150,{}))(g(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(-887297+918479)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
